title: The Fight Against Kuro Nears Its End
description: On pages 8–11, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Since you won't listen...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I will kill myself! And you won't get the will!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: WAH!! Wait!! Don't make a stupid deci- slon!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I just want the will, if I don't get it, I'll be in a big trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Okay, I'll let the kids go!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Not like they can escape anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't forget to mark it with your thumbprint

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If we pretend to stay Lincoln- Scious, will we live?...?

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I think so... Kaya-san have saved us...

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Didn't the captain always say that if you know you're gonna lose, then you must flee?

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: But Captain is a liar!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Now, he's bravely fighting alone!!! He was all covered in blood...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: and still wanted to protect us

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We can't let Kaya- San Die...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We are the USOPPP pirate group

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: "I'm leaving all of my inheritance to my Butler, CIA- Hador."

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Good... this is definitely your will

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That even saved me time hypnotizing you...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Now, you have to die!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If you're still alive...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The will's no better than a piece of scrap paper

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You prom- ised me, you won't hurt the boys!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't worry!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm a man who keeps his words

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There they are!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Stop! Stop! There! There!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: OW OW!! Don't hit me there, I have a wound!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Over there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Thank God!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: She's still alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But she's in danger!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Let me down...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You just wait there!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
